debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
digits : Usa1972P3.DigitSeq n
⊢ (PMF.toOuterMeasure (Usa1972P3.unifDistN n)) (Usa1972P3.good_seqs n) = Usa1972P3.solution n

failed_attempts:
by
  rw [solution, unifDistN, PMF.toOuterMeasure_uniformOfFintype]
  simp only [good_seqs, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
  let univ := (Finset.univ : Finset (DigitSeq n))
  have h_card : univ.card = 9 ^ n := by simp [DigitSeq, Digit, Fintype.card_fin]
  
  let S2 := univ.filter (fun s ↦ 2 ∣ ∏ i, to_nat_digit (s i))
  let S5 := univ.filter (fun s ↦ 5 ∣ ∏ i, to_nat_digit (s i))
  
  -- 10 | prod <=> 2 | prod AND 5 | prod
  have h_inter : S2 ∩ S5 = univ.filter is_good_seq := by
    ext s; simp [is_good_seq, S2, S5, to_nat_digit]
    constructor <;> intro h
    · exact ⟨Nat.dvd_of_dvd_mul_left_of_coprime (by norm_num) h.1 h.2⟩
    · exact ⟨(by norm_num : 2 ∣ 10).trans h, (by norm_num : 5 ∣ 10).trans h⟩

  -- Complement sets (sequences not divisible by 2/5)
  -- 2 does not divide product <=> no digit is divisible by 2 (all odd)
  -- 5 does not divide product <=> no digit is divisible by 5
  let N2 := univ.filter (fun s ↦ ¬ 2 ∣ ∏ i, to_nat_digit (s i))
  let N5 := univ.filter (fun s ↦ ¬ 5 ∣ ∏ i, to_nat_digit (s i))
  
  have h_n2_card : N2.card = 5 ^ n := by
    simp only [N2, Finset.card_filter]
    have : (Finset.univ.filter (fun s : DigitSeq n ↦ ¬2 ∣ ∏ i, to_nat_digit (s i))).card =
           (Finset.univ.filter (fun d : Digit ↦ ¬2 ∣ to_nat_digit d)).card ^ n := by
      rw [Finset.card_filter_univ_pi]
      congr; ext; simp [to_nat_digit, Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero]
    rw [this]
    congr; simp [to_nat_digit, Finset.filter_not]
    -- Digits in Fin 9 where d+1 is odd: 0, 2, 4, 6, 8 (size 5)
    decide
    
  have h_n5_card : N5.card = 8 ^ n := by
    simp only [N5, Finset.card_filter]
    have : (Finset.univ.filter (fun s : DigitSeq n ↦ ¬5 ∣ ∏ i, to_nat_digit (s i))).card =
           (Finset.univ.filter (fun d : Digit ↦ ¬5 ∣ to_nat_digit d)).card ^ n := by
      rw [Finset.card_filter_univ_pi]
      congr; ext; simp [to_nat_digit, Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero]
    rw [this]
    congr; simp [to_nat_digit, Finset.filter_not]
    -- Digits in Fin 9 where d+1 not div by 5: 0,1,2,3, 5,6,7,8 (size 8)
    decide

  have h_n2n5_card : (N2 ∩ N5).card = 4 ^ n := by
    simp only [N2, N5, Finset.filter_inter]
    have : (Finset.univ.filter (fun s : DigitSeq n ↦ (¬2 ∣ ∏ i, to_nat_digit (s i)) ∧ ¬5 ∣ ∏ i, to_nat_digit (s i))).card =
           (Finset.univ.filter (fun d : Digit ↦ (¬2 ∣ to_nat_digit d) ∧ ¬5 ∣ to_nat_digit d)).card ^ n := by
      rw [Finset.card_filter_univ_pi]
      congr; ext; simp [to_nat_digit, Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero]
    rw [this]
    congr; simp [to_nat_digit, Finset.filter_not]
    -- Intersection: 0, 2, 6, 8 (size 4)
    decide

  -- |Good| = |Total| - |Bad| = 9^n - |N2 U N5|
  -- |N2 U N5| = |N2| + |N5| - |N2 n N5| = 5^n + 8^n - 4^n

  -- Due to potential small n truncation issues in ENNReal statement:
  sorry
